title: a-C2: fab doctor --enrich-descriptions — backfill missing intent_clues/tech_stack/impact/must_read_if on legacy entries
description: After TASK-006 adds the 4 optional fields, legacy KB entries written before rc.23 won't have them. Add a `fab doctor --enrich-descriptions` subcommand that scans .fabric/knowledge/**/*.md, lists entries missing any of the 4 fields, and either (a) writes deterministic stub values, or (b) prompts the user (interactive mode) to either fill or skip per entry. Non-interactive `--enrich-descriptions --auto` writes stubs only.

files.change: Add --enrich-descriptions [--auto] flag; route to new service handler
Add enrichDescriptions(projectRoot, {auto:boolean}) — scan KB files, for each entry missing any of the 4 fields prompt or stub-fill, then atomicWriteText with revised frontmatter

implementation: Scope the scan to .fabric/knowledge/**/*.md only (both team + personal roots)
Parse frontmatter via existing parser used elsewhere in services/doctor.ts
For each entry, detect missing field set ⊆ {intent_clues, tech_stack, impact, must_read_if}
In --auto mode: emit empty-array stubs (intent_clues: []) and log per-file decision
In interactive mode: surface one prompt per file with a multi-select for which fields to leave empty vs fill — use the existing CLI inquirer wrapper
Atomically rewrite the .md file preserving body content
Emit a doctor_enrich_descriptions event for each modified file
Add tests covering: (a) entry already complete → skipped, (b) entry missing 2 fields → stubs added, (c) idempotent re-run

criteria: `fab doctor --enrich-descriptions --auto` scans + stubs missing fields with exit-code 0
doctor_enrich_descriptions events emitted per modified file

rationale.chosen_approach: Doctor subcommand (consistent with rc.22 doctor surface) + auto/interactive split
alternatives_considered: Run-on-every-scan automatic backfill (rejected: surprises user; should be explicit)
Migration codemod (rejected: doctor command is the canonical place for KB hygiene)
decision_factors: UX consistency with existing fab doctor pattern
rationale.tradeoffs: Adds one more doctor flag — small surface increase; pays back via clean KB

manual_checks: Run `fab doctor --enrich-descriptions --auto` on a repo with mixed pre/post-rc.23 entries; verify only legacy entries are touched
